channel.title: Cryptocurrency on Tobias Raabe
channel.description: Recent content in Cryptocurrency on Tobias Raabe

item.title: Cryptocurrency Market Prediction
item.description: Project type: research Source files: Github The project is about market prediction in cryptocurrency markets like Potcoin and was developed during a programing class for economists which focused on the embedding of the research project in a Waf framework. Waf is an automation tool for software design.
